name: shop_no_ads_premium
description: Premium VIP variant of the NO-ADS badge: the same crossed-out "ADS" burst shield, now crowned with a small gold crown and garnished with a star coin and a teal gem at its base. The word "ADS" is the requested text.
prompt_extra: same badge design language as the standard no-ads badge; richer, more royal

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
